use_cases: Primary call-to-action button for SaaS landing pages and hero sections
Interactive button component with multiple variants for consistent UI systems
Accessible button with composition support via asChild pattern for Radix UI integration
Versatile button supporting keyboard navigation and focus states for form interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable button component with CVA (class-variance-authority) supporting 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, includes hover states, focus-visible outlines, and disabled states. Designed as a core UI primitive for building consistent design systems across web applications.
